title: Contact - Michelle Scrogham MP
text_excerpt: Contact - Michelle Scrogham MP Skip to main content Home About My priorities News Get in touch More Menu Contact Contact me anytime Fill in your details below and I will be in touch soon. Name (Required) First Last Address (Required) A strict parliamentary rule means that I can only take up issues raised by people who live in the Barrow and Furness constituency. Please confirm your address below. Street Address Address Line 2 City/Town/Village Post Code Email (Required) Message (Required) Please let us know what's on your mind. Have a question for me? Ask away. Name This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged. Email michelle.scrogham.mp@parliament.uk Telephone 01229 343360 Hotline hours are: Tuesday – 12pm-3pm Thursday – 12pm-3pm Voicemails are taken and responded to outside of these hours. ——- WhatsApp 07721 148088 Messages monitored 9am-5pm, Monday to Friday. Hotline hours are: Tuesday – 12pm-3pm Thursday – 12pm-3pm Voicemails are taken and responded to outside of these hours. Mail c/o Broadcasting House, Hartington Street, Barrow in Furness, LA14 5SL Note that this is a temporary office and is not currently open to visitors without an appointment.
